creator: bourne.identity@hotmail.com
text: I would like to report a possible bug on my amd64 system running FreeBSD 10.2, which at least one gentleman also suffers from on his 10.3 system. While typing with the X server running, keys of my keyboard become 'sticky': pressing 'A' once results in multiple (dozens, sometimes hundreds) of 'A'. This nuisance - which happens about once in 5 minutes of typing - usually stops by itself and the key gets 'unstuck' automatically after a couple of seconds. This happens only under FreeBSD (not Linux, not Windows) and only under the X server (not when typing on the console when there is no X).
